_comment: Honest per-platform capability matrix (PORT-01, Waves 48/50). Each platform declares which portable nobro_hal provider contracts it satisfies, at what tier, so 'platform breadth' is machine-checkable and never an nRF-shaped placeholder. Tiers: deep = implemented + automated on-hardware HIL evidence; provider = portable trait implemented + compile-verified against the real target, with physical evidence stated separately; conformance = shared portable-core suite available; absent = not implemented. validated_by names the current automated gate.

nrf52840.hil: automated with tools/hil_matrix.py; private endpoints stay outside the repository

rp2350.hil: not yet integrated into the automated HIL collector
rp2350.validated_by: portable timebase provider compile-verified for thumbv8m; firmware calls verify_timebase_provider() and includes it in all_pass; local physical smoke passed 2026-07-11; conformance suite (7 subsystems) + dual-core; Wave 58 cross-core reactor PHYSICALLY VERIFIED on real Pico 2 W 2026-07-12 (core1 drains a cross-core MpmcChannel, core1_acc==core1_processed*3)

esp32c3.limitations: no PPI-equivalent hardware event router; servo PWM via LEDC/MCPWM differs from the nRF model
esp32c3.hil: not yet integrated into the automated HIL collector
esp32c3.validated_by: portable timebase provider compile-verified for riscv32imc; firmware calls verify_timebase_provider() and includes it in all_pass; local physical smoke passed and prior app restored 2026-07-11; conformance suite (7 subsystems)
